metadata.description: Robotics Connect — agent skills that take a humanoid from plugged-in-on-the-bench to a sim-to-real-valid Isaac Sim RL training job on a DGX Spark, and onboard a robot the agent has never seen before.

plugins.name: robotics-connect
plugins.description: Discover and control a humanoid on the bench, characterize its real sensor + effector envelope into a machine-readable robot descriptor (the real-to-sim calibration card), and stage a sensor-calibrated, free-base Isaac Lab RL job from that descriptor — generalizable to new humanoids. Verified on a Unitree G1 EDU.
